antipattern.symptom: Runbook reads 'engineer investigates' across all steps.
antipattern.fix: Each step gets precondition + concrete action + artefact.

antipattern.symptom: Engineer runs step 3 → wrong system state → no rollback documented.
antipattern.fix: Every side-effect step lists rollback or hard STOP.

antipattern.symptom: Single incident exhausts entire response window mid-step.
antipattern.fix: Each phase publishes wall-clock budget; exceeding triggers escalation.

antipattern.symptom: Same incident pattern recurs because previous runs were undocumented.
antipattern.fix: Validator requires run-record artefact after execution; CI checks evidence_root.
